steps.title: Identify what the student needs to do
steps.content: The student wants to provide a quotation from chapter 17. The notes identify exactly what that quotation is: “The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection.” Only a choice that includes this quotation can accomplish the stated goal.

steps.title: Find the choice with the chapter 17 quotation and appropriate context
steps.content: Choice A includes the quotation and frames it with relevant information about chapter 17—specifically, that it discusses “various skeptics' takes on the concept of nostalgia,” which matches the notes exactly. Choices B, C, and D either lack the quotation entirely or reference chapter 9. This matches choice A — A is correct.
